programmer_notes: RefsAnnouncement (node_id,rid,refs_root,timestamp,sig) + InventoryAnnouncement (node_id,rids,timestamp,sig), each Ed25519-signed over canonical bytes. refs_root=sha256 of canonical SignedRefs. GossipState.ingest_* keeps freshest verified per (node,rid); seeders(rid) lists advertisers. 'gither announce' emits both (timestamp=int(time.time())). New: src/gither/gossip.py, tests/test_gossip.py (9 tests). 53 tests total. Socket transport deferred to layer 4b (gither.transport).
summary: add gossip announcements (signed inventory + ref announcements + freshness merge)
why: P2P layer 4a: nodes must tell peers which repos they seed and whose refs advanced, in a way a relay cannot forge or replay. Signed, timestamped announcements + a freshness-based merge let the network converge without a server. Modeled on Radicle gossip; builds on peer/identity/sigrefs. Only the socket transport (4b) remains.
